bullets.content: IF a user requests account/order changes or returns → THEN ask for identity information by requesting either the user's email OR the user's first name, last name, and zip code
IF the user provides an email → THEN call find_user_id_by_email(email) to obtain user_id and then call get_user_details(user_id)
IF the user provides name and zip → THEN call find_user_id_by_name_zip(first_name, last_name, zip) to obtain user_id and then call get_user_details(user_id)
IF a user references or has multiple orders → THEN ask for or request the specific order ID; otherwise list the user's orders and ask which order contains the item(s) in question
IF an order ID is provided or selected → THEN call get_order_details(order_id) before taking any order-specific action
IF a product variant or availability needs checking for an exchange or size change → THEN call get_product_details(product_id) to list available variants, their availability, and prices

IF order.status == 'pending' AND the user requests an item modification (size, variant, etc.) → THEN call modify_pending_order_items(order_id, item_ids, new_item_ids, payment_method_id) and apply any price difference (issue refund or charge) to the original payment method

IF order.status == 'delivered' AND the user requests an exchange → THEN present available replacement variants (via get_product_details) and, after user confirmation, call exchange_delivered_order_items(order_id, item_ids, new_item_ids, payment_method_id) and record the exchange_price_difference (negative means refund)

IF order.status == 'delivered' AND the user requests a return of delivered items → THEN call return_delivered_order_items(order_id, item_ids, payment_method_id) and set return_items and return_payment_method_id accordingly

IF order.status == 'pending' AND the user requests cancellation → THEN require a cancellation reason and call cancel_pending_order(order_id, reason) which issues a refund to the original payment method
IF a refund is applied as part of modify/exchange/return/cancel actions → THEN use the original payment method id from the order/payment history as the payment_method_id when invoking the action tool
IF a desired variant is unavailable → THEN do not attempt to exchange to that variant and explicitly inform the user that the variant is not available
IF multiple orders are on the account → THEN ask the user to specify which order ID contains the items to act on
IF presenting exchange or replacement options → THEN show available variants with their options, availability, and prices, and ask the user to choose a specific variant before proceeding

IF an action will change the order or payment (modify, exchange, cancel, or return) → THEN summarize the exact changes and the price difference or refund amount, state the refund destination, and ask the user to confirm (explicit 'yes') before executing
IF a refund will be issued to a credit card → THEN inform the user the refund will be issued to that card and typically arrive within 5-7 business days

IF the system cannot comply with a user request due to policy constraints (e.g., changing refund destination) → THEN explain the limitation, provide the allowed options (original payment method or existing gift card), and offer to transfer to a human agent for further assistance

IF the user has not provided identity info (email OR first name, last name, zip) → THEN do not retrieve order details or perform order actions until identity info is provided and lookup returns a user_id
IF an order is to be modified → THEN require order.status == 'pending'; do not modify items on orders that are already delivered (use exchange/return flows instead)
IF an exchange or return is to be performed → THEN require order.status == 'delivered' for delivered-order exchange/return actions
IF cancelling a pending order → THEN require the user to provide a cancellation reason (e.g., 'ordered by mistake' or 'no longer needed') before calling cancel_pending_order
IF a refund is to be issued → THEN refunds must be sent to the original payment method used on the order or to an existing gift card on the account; do not change refund destination
IF items are modified on a pending order → THEN inform the user that no further item modifications can be made on that order after the change

iterations.policy:
## Information Gathering
  [info-001] IF a user requests account/order changes or returns → THEN ask for identity information by requesting either the user's email OR the user's first name, last name, and zip code
  [info-002] IF the user provides an email → THEN call find_user_id_by_email(email) to obtain user_id and then call get_user_details(user_id)
  [info-003] IF the user provides name and zip → THEN call find_user_id_by_name_zip(first_name, last_name, zip) to obtain user_id and then call get_user_details(user_id)
  [info-004] IF a user references or has multiple orders → THEN ask for or request the specific order ID; otherwise list the user's orders and ask which order contains the item(s) in question
  [info-005] IF an order ID is provided or selected → THEN call get_order_details(order_id) before taking any order-specific action
  [info-006] IF a product variant or availability needs checking for an exchange or size change → THEN call get_product_details(product_id) to list available variants, their availability, and prices

## Action Execution
  [acti-001] IF order.status == 'pending' AND the user requests an item modification (size, variant, etc.) → THEN call modify_pending_order_items(order_id, item_ids, new_item_ids, payment_method_id) and apply any price difference (issue refund or charge) to the original payment method
  [acti-002] IF order.status == 'delivered' AND the user requests an exchange → THEN present available replacement variants (via get_product_details) and, after user confirmation, call exchange_delivered_order_items(order_id, item_ids, new_item_ids, payment_method_id) and record the exchange_price_difference (negative means refund)
  [acti-003] IF order.status == 'delivered' AND the user requests a return of delivered items → THEN call return_delivered_order_items(order_id, item_ids, payment_method_id) and set return_items and return_payment_method_id accordingly
  [acti-004] IF order.status == 'pending' AND the user requests cancellation → THEN require a cancellation reason and call cancel_pending_order(order_id, reason) which issues a refund to the original payment method
  [acti-005] IF a refund is applied as part of modify/exchange/return/cancel actions → THEN use the original payment method id from the order/payment history as the payment_method_id when invoking the action tool
  [acti-006] IF a desired variant is unavailable → THEN do not attempt to exchange to that variant and explicitly inform the user that the variant is not available

## Confirmation Communication
  [conf-001] IF multiple orders are on the account → THEN ask the user to specify which order ID contains the items to act on
  [conf-002] IF presenting exchange or replacement options → THEN show available variants with their options, availability, and prices, and ask the user to choose a specific variant before proceeding
  [conf-003] IF an action will change the order or payment (modify, exchange, cancel, or return) → THEN summarize the exact changes and the price difference or refund amount, state the refund destination, and ask the user to confirm (explicit 'yes') before executing
  [conf-004] IF a refund will be issued to a credit card → THEN inform the user the refund will be issued to that card and typically arrive within 5-7 business days
  [conf-005] IF the system cannot comply with a user request due to policy constraints (e.g., changing refund destination) → THEN explain the limitation, provide the allowed options (original payment method or existing gift card), and offer to transfer to a human agent for further assistance

## Precondition Rules
  [prec-001] IF the user has not provided identity info (email OR first name, last name, zip) → THEN do not retrieve order details or perform order actions until identity info is provided and lookup returns a user_id
  [prec-002] IF an order is to be modified → THEN require order.status == 'pending'; do not modify items on orders that are already delivered (use exchange/return flows instead)
  [prec-003] IF an exchange or return is to be performed → THEN require order.status == 'delivered' for delivered-order exchange/return actions
  [prec-004] IF cancelling a pending order → THEN require the user to provide a cancellation reason (e.g., 'ordered by mistake' or 'no longer needed') before calling cancel_pending_order
  [prec-005] IF a refund is to be issued → THEN refunds must be sent to the original payment method used on the order or to an existing gift card on the account; do not change refund destination
  [prec-006] IF items are modified on a pending order → THEN inform the user that no further item modifications can be made on that order after the change

## Information Gathering
  [info-001] IF a user requests account/order changes or returns → THEN ask for identity information by requesting either the user's email OR the user's first name, last name, and zip code
  [info-002] IF the user provides an email → THEN call find_user_id_by_email(email) to obtain user_id and then call get_user_details(user_id)
  [info-003] IF the user provides name and zip → THEN call find_user_id_by_name_zip(first_name, last_name, zip) to obtain user_id and then call get_user_details(user_id)
  [info-004] IF a user references or has multiple orders → THEN ask for or request the specific order ID; otherwise list the user's orders and ask which order contains the item(s) in question
  [info-005] IF an order ID is provided or selected → THEN call get_order_details(order_id) before taking any order-specific action
  [info-006] IF a product variant or availability needs checking for an exchange or size change → THEN call get_product_details(product_id) to list available variants, their availability, and prices

  [acti-002] IF order.status == 'delivered' AND the user requests an exchange → THEN present available replacement variants (via get_product_details) and, after user confirmation, call exchange_delivered_order_items(order_id, item_ids, new_item_ids, payment_method_id) and record the exchange_price_difference (negative means refund)

  [acti-004] IF order.status == 'pending' AND the user requests cancellation → THEN require a cancellation reason and call cancel_pending_order(order_id, reason) which issues a refund to the original payment method
  [acti-005] IF a refund is applied as part of modify/exchange/return/cancel actions → THEN use the original payment method id from the order/payment history as the payment_method_id when invoking the action tool
  [acti-006] IF a desired variant is unavailable → THEN do not attempt to exchange to that variant and explicitly inform the user that the variant is not available

## Confirmation Communication
  [conf-001] IF multiple orders are on the account → THEN ask the user to specify which order ID contains the items to act on
  [conf-002] IF presenting exchange or replacement options → THEN show available variants with their options, availability, and prices, and ask the user to choose a specific variant before proceeding
  [conf-003] IF an action will change the order or payment (modify, exchange, cancel, or return) → THEN summarize the exact changes and the price difference or refund amount, state the refund destination, and ask the user to confirm (explicit 'yes') before executing
  [conf-004] IF a refund will be issued to a credit card → THEN inform the user the refund will be issued to that card and typically arrive within 5-7 business days
  [conf-005] IF the system cannot comply with a user request due to policy constraints (e.g., changing refund destination) → THEN explain the limitation, provide the allowed options (original payment method or existing gift card), and offer to transfer to a human agent for further assistance

## Precondition Rules
  [prec-001] IF the user has not provided identity info (email OR first name, last name, zip) → THEN do not retrieve order details or perform order actions until identity info is provided and lookup returns a user_id
  [prec-002] IF an order is to be modified → THEN require order.status == 'pending'; do not modify items on orders that are already delivered (use exchange/return flows instead)
  [prec-003] IF an exchange or return is to be performed → THEN require order.status == 'delivered' for delivered-order exchange/return actions
  [prec-004] IF cancelling a pending order → THEN require the user to provide a cancellation reason (e.g., 'ordered by mistake' or 'no longer needed') before calling cancel_pending_order
  [prec-005] IF a refund is to be issued → THEN refunds must be sent to the original payment method used on the order or to an existing gift card on the account; do not change refund destination
  [prec-006] IF items are modified on a pending order → THEN inform the user that no further item modifications can be made on that order after the change

diagnostic_log.raw_llm_response:
{
  "information_gathering": [
    "IF a user requests account/order changes or returns → THEN ask for identity information by requesting either the user's email OR the user's first name, last name, and zip code",
    "IF the user provides an email → THEN call find_user_id_by_email(email) to obtain user_id and then call get_user_details(user_id)",
    "IF the user provides name and zip → THEN call find_user_id_by_name_zip(first_name, last_name, zip) to obtain user_id and then call get_user_details(user_id)",
    "IF a user references or has multiple orders → THEN ask for or request the specific order ID; otherwise list the user's orders and ask which order contains the item(s) in question",
    "IF an order ID is provided or selected → THEN call get_order_details(order_id) before taking any order-specific action",
    "IF a product variant or availability needs checking for an exchange or size change → THEN call get_product_details(product_id) to list available variants, their availability, and prices"
  ],
  "action_execution": [
    "IF order.status == 'pending' AND the user requests an item modification (size, variant, etc.) → THEN call modify_pending_order_items(order_id, item_ids, new_item_ids, payment_method_id) and apply any price difference (issue refund or charge) to the original payment method",
    "IF order.status == 'delivered' AND the user requests an exchange → THEN present available replacement variants (via get_product_details) and, after user confirmation, call exchange_delivered_order_items(order_id, item_ids, new_item_ids, payment_method_id) and record the exchange_price_difference (negative means refund)",
    "IF order.status == 'delivered' AND the user requests a return of delivered items → THEN call return_delivered_order_items(order_id, item_ids, payment_method_id) and set return_items and return_payment_method_id accordingly",
    "IF order.status == 'pending' AND the user requests cancellation → THEN require a cancellation reason and call cancel_pending_order(order_id, reason) which issues a refund to the original payment method",
    "IF a refund is applied as part of modify/exchange/return/cancel actions → THEN use the original payment method id from the order/payment history as the payment_method_id when invoking the action tool",
    "IF a desired variant is unavailable → THEN do not attempt to exchange to that variant and explicitly inform the user that the variant is not available"
  ],
  "confirmation_communication": [
    "IF multiple orders are on the account → THEN ask the user to specify which order ID contains the items to act on",
    "IF presenting exchange or replacement options → THEN show available variants with their options, availability, and prices, and ask the user to choose a specific variant before proceeding",
    "IF an action will change the order or payment (modify, exchange, cancel, or return) → THEN summarize the exact changes and the price difference or refund amount, state the refund destination, and ask the user to confirm (explicit 'yes') before executing",
    "IF a refund will be issued to a credit card → THEN inform the user the refund will be issued to that card and typically arrive within 5-7 business days",
    "IF the system cannot comply with a user request due to policy constraints (e.g., changing refund destination) → THEN explain the limitation, provide the allowed options (original payment method or existing gift card), and offer to transfer to a human agent for further assistance"
  ],
  "precondition_rules": [
    "IF the user has not provided identity info (email OR first name, last name, zip) → THEN do not retrieve order details or perform order actions until identity info is provided and lookup returns a user_id",
    "IF an order is to be modified → THEN require order.status == 'pending'; do not modify items on orders that are already delivered (use exchange/return flows instead)",
    "IF an exchange or return is to be performed → THEN require order.status == 'delivered' for delivered-order exchange/return actions",
    "IF cancelling a pending order → THEN require the user to provide a cancellation reason (e.g., 'ordered by mistake' or 'no longer needed') before calling cancel_pending_order",
    "IF a refund is to be issued → THEN refunds must be sent to the original payment method used on the order or to an existing gift card on the account; do not change refund destination",
    "IF items are modified on a pending order → THEN inform the user that no further item modifications can be made on that order after the change"
  ]
}
